details: The agent ran multiple kubectl commands against the cluster (get pods, get events, get pvc, describe pvc, get sc, get pv, describe pod) and correctly traced the full chain: pod db-5bfcfcd584-jcf6z is Pending because it mounts PVC 'data-cache', which is Pending because its StorageClass 'fast-ssd' does not exist in the cluster (only 'standard' exists). The complete chain pod -> unbound PVC -> nonexistent StorageClass was clearly identified and reported.
